nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Cloudy, with a low around 28. South wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Light Snow then Light Rain Likely
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely between 7am and 8am, then snow and a chance of freezing rain between 8am and 10am, then rain likely between 10am and 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 50, with temperatures falling to around 47 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 8 to 45 mph, with gusts as high as 64 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. Little or no ice accumulation expected.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 18, with temperatures rising to around 21 overnight. Northwest wind 15 to 41 mph, with gusts as high as 62 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow after 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 33. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 20. Northeast wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Saturday
